1129.k: (begin to) build(-er), obtain children, make, repair, set (up), [idiom] surely.

1135.r: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H2605 (חָנָן); son of Chanan;

1148.r: probably from H1121 (בֵּן) with pron. suff.; our son;

1151.r: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H5971 (עַם) with pronomial suffix; son of my people;

1152.r: from H5475 (סוֹד) and H3050 (יָהּ) with prepositional prefix; in (the) counsel of Jehovah;

1154.r: from an unused root meaning to be sour;

1156.k: ask, desire, make (petition), pray, request, seek.

1157.d: in up to or over against; generally at, beside, among, behind, for, etc.

1158.d: to gush over, i.e. to swell; (figuratively) to desire earnestly; by implication to ask

1167.d: a master; hence, a husband, or (figuratively) owner (often used with another noun in modifications of this latter sense)

1195.d: Banana, the name of four Israelite

1196.r: from a derivative of H6031 (עָנָה) with prepositional prefix; in affliction

1325.d: {a bath or Hebrew measure (as a means of division) of liquids}

1327.r: feminine from an unused root (meaning to break in pieces);

1332.r: from H1323 (בַּת) and H3050 (יָהּ); daughter (i.e. worshipper) of Jah;

1337.r: from H1323 (בַּת) and a masculine plural from H7227 (רַב);

1338.r: from H1334 (בָּתַר); (with the article) the craggy spot;

1339.r: from H1323 (בַּת) and H7651 (שֶׁבַע) (in the sense of H7650 (שָׁבַע)); daughter of an oath;

1353.d: redemption (including the right and the object); by implication, relationship

1355.d: {the back (as rounded); by analogy, the top or rim, a boss, a vault, arch of eye, bulwarks, etc.}

1358.d: a pit (for wild animals) (as cut out)
1358.r: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H1461 (גּוּב);

1360.d: a reservoir; by analogy, a marsh

1361.k: exalt, be haughty, be (make) high(-er), lift up, mount up, be proud, raise up great height, upward.

1363.k: excellency, haughty, height, high, loftiness, pride.

1366.d: properly, a cord (as twisted), i.e. (by implication) a boundary; by extension the territory inclosed
1366.k: border, bound, coast, [idiom] great, landmark, limit, quarter, space.

1369.k: force, mastery, might, mighty (act, power), power, strength.

1371.r: from an unused root meaning to be high (in the forehead);

1372.d: baldness in the forehead; by analogy, a bare spot on the right side of cloth

1373.r: from the same as H1354 (גַב); collective

1375.d: a goblet; by analogy, the calyx of aflower

1378.r: from an unused root (probably meaning to freeze);

1379.d: properly, to twist as arope;  to bound (as by a line)

1380.r: from H1379 (גָּבַל) (in the sense of a chain of hills); a mountain;

1382.d: a Gebalite, or inhabitant of Gebal

1384.r: from an unused root meaning to be arched or contracted;

1385.r: feminine from the same as H1384 (גִּבֵּן);

1386.d: a hump or peak of hills

1388.r: by permutation for H1389 (גִּבְעָה); a hill;
